zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG於1142年出生在義大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂時，她的父親Guillaume V de Montferrat28歲，母親Judith von Babenberg27歲。她於1155年與Guigues V d'Albon結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1228年在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾享年87歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG于1142年出生在意大利皮蒙特阿斯蒂时，她的父亲Guillaume V de Montferrat28岁，母亲Judith von Babenberg27岁。她于1155年与Guigues V d'Albon结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1228年在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾享年87岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯易瑟艾格雷諾布爾。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BABENBERG
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places called Rabenberg, as for example in Saxony or Lower Saxony.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and French form of   Beatrix  , which was quite popular in England during the Middle Ages, and strongly revived in the 19th century. It is most famous as the name of Dante's beloved, and is borne by the elder (  b. 1988 ) of the Duke of York's daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG was born in 1142, in Asti, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Guillaume V de Montferrat, was 28 and her mother, Judith von Babenberg, was 27. She married Guigues V d'Albon in 1155. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died about 1228, in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, at the age of 87, and was buried in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG est née en 1142, à Asti, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Guillaume V de Montferrat, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Judith von Babenberg, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Guigues V d'Albon en 1155. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1228, à Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterrée à Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG 1142 in Asti, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guillaume V de Montferrat 28 und ihre Mutter Judith von Babenberg 27. Sie hat 1155 Guigues V d'Albon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1228 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich und wurde in Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG è nata il nel 1142 nel Asti, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Guillaume V de Montferrat, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Judith von Babenberg, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Guigues V d'Albon nel 1155. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì circa 1228, nel Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolta a Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERGが1142年にイタリアピエモントアスティで生まれた時，父Guillaume V de Montferratは28歳，母Judith von Babenbergは27歳であった。1155年にGuigues V d'Albonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1228年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアグレノブルで87歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスイスeアグレノブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG(이)가 1142년 이탈리아 피몽 애스티에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guillaume V de Montferrat(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Judith von Babenberg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1155년 Guigues V d'Albon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1228년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 그렌콥일에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 이스e르 그렌콥일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG nasceu em 1142, em Asti, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Guillaume V de Montferrat, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Judith von Babenberg, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Guigues V d'Albon em 1155. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1228, em Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, com 87 anos, e foi sepultada em Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG родилась в 1142 г. в местности асти, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Guillaume V de Montferrat было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith von Babenberg, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guigues V d'Albon в 1155 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1228 г. в местности гренобл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция в возрасте 87 лет и была похоронена в местности гренобл, исeр, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Béatrice DE MONTFERRAT-DE BABENBERG nació en 1142, en Asti, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Guillaume V de Montferrat, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Judith von Babenberg, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Guigues V d'Albon en 1155. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1228, en Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultada en Grenoble, Isère, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
